name: kwhab-community-discovery
description: KW Hab Community Discovery Platform — hackathon MVP

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && rm -rf pgdata && docker compose up -d db
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec db psql -U kwhab -d kwhab
scripts.dev: npm run db:up && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
